segments.label: Cinematic Hook
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const gsap = context.libs?.gsap || globalThis.gsap; const ease = gsap?.parseEase ? gsap.parseEase('expo.out') : function(v){ v = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v)); return 1 - Math.pow(1 - v, 4); }; const p = ease(context.progress); const g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#050812'); g.addColorStop(.55, '#082435'); g.addColorStop(1, '#261633'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.save(); ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen'; for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { const rg = ctx.createRadialGradient(375 + i * 465, 285 + Math.sin(t + i) * 105, 0, 375 + i * 465, 285 + Math.sin(t + i) * 105, 495); rg.addColorStop(0, ['rgba(125,211,252,.42)', 'rgba(123,216,143,.28)', 'rgba(250,204,21,.25)'][i]); rg.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); ctx.fillStyle = rg; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); } ctx.restore(); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = '900 96px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Runtime storyboard', 132, 392 - (1 - p) * 92); ctx.fillStyle = '#bdefff'; ctx.font = '800 32px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('segments, active dependencies, camera, inspection', 138, 455); for (let i = 0; i < 22; i++) { const a = t * .8 + i * .55; ctx.strokeStyle = i % 2 ? 'rgba(123,216,143,.36)' : 'rgba(125,211,252,.4)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(w / 2, h - 250, 210 + i * 28, 38 + i * 5, a * .08, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke(); } }

segments.label: Data Command
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const d3 = context.libs?.d3 || globalThis.d3; const p = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, context.progress)); const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3); const values = [0.22, 0.66, 0.48, 0.88, 0.72, 0.94, 0.58, 0.82]; const scale = d3?.scaleLinear ? d3.scaleLinear().domain([0, 1]).range([0, 500]) : function(v){ return v * 500; }; const g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#06111f'); g.addColorStop(1, '#102638'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = '900 64px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Data command segment', 128, 150); ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect ? ctx.roundRect(120, 208, w - 240, 690, 36) : ctx.rect(120, 208, w - 240, 690); ctx.fill(); for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { const bar = scale(values[i]) * ease; const x = 238 + i * 190; const y = 820 - bar; const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, y, 0, 820); grad.addColorStop(0, i % 3 === 0 ? '#7dd3fc' : i % 3 === 1 ? '#7bd88f' : '#facc15'); grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255,255,255,.1)'); ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect ? ctx.roundRect(x, y, 86, bar, 18) : ctx.rect(x, y, 86, bar); ctx.fill(); } ctx.lineWidth = 8; ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.shadowColor = '#7dd3fc'; ctx.shadowBlur = 22; ctx.beginPath(); values.forEach((v, i) => { const x = 281 + i * 190; const y = 820 - scale(v) * .72 * ease + Math.sin(t * 2 + i) * 10; if (i) ctx.lineTo(x, y); else ctx.moveTo(x, y); }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; ctx.fillStyle = '#facc15'; ctx.font = '900 36px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('inspect time 4s -> activeSegmentId proof', 128, h - 120); }

segments.label: Depth Lockup
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const THREE = context.libs?.THREE || globalThis.THREE; const g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#050812'); g.addColorStop(.55, '#171a38'); g.addColorStop(1, '#2c172c'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = '900 64px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Depth lockup segment', 128, 150); const pts = []; for (let x = -1; x <= 1; x += 2) for (let y = -1; y <= 1; y += 2) for (let z = -1; z <= 1; z += 2) { let v = THREE?.Vector3 ? new THREE.Vector3(x, y, z) : { x, y, z }; if (v.applyAxisAngle && THREE) { v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), t * 1.3); v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0), t * .75); } const s = 315 / (2.8 + v.z); pts.push({ x: w / 2 + v.x * s * 2.18, y: h / 2 + v.y * s * 2.18, z: v.z }); } const edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[0,4],[3,1],[3,2],[3,7],[5,1],[5,4],[5,7],[6,2],[6,4],[6,7]]; ctx.save(); ctx.lineWidth = 11; ctx.shadowColor = '#7dd3fc'; ctx.shadowBlur = 34; edges.forEach((e, i) => { ctx.strokeStyle = i % 2 ? '#facc15' : '#7dd3fc'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pts[e[0]].x, pts[e[0]].y); ctx.lineTo(pts[e[1]].x, pts[e[1]].y); ctx.stroke(); }); ctx.restore(); for (let i = 0; i < 22; i++) { ctx.strokeStyle = i % 2 ? 'rgba(123,216,143,.35)' : 'rgba(125,211,252,.26)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(w / 2, h / 2 + 250, 230 + i * 28, 42 + i * 5, t * .22 + i * .08, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke(); } ctx.fillStyle = '#7bd88f'; ctx.font = '900 36px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('inspect time 7s -> activeSegmentId depth', 128, h - 120); }
